title: thelypteris pilosiuscula
intro: Thelypteris pilosiuscula, also known as the hairy shield fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris pilosiuscula include relief from menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris pilosiuscula include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
